content:
历史状态切换日志
{{#each (json events)}}
{{dateLabel}}
{{timeLabel}}
{{#unless @last}}
{{/unless}}
{{event}}
{{#if detail}}
{{detail}}
{{/if}}
{{/each}}
defaultContent:
历史状态切换日志
加载中...
styles: .business-text { padding: 0; margin: 0; height: 100%; } .sbc-history-log { height: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 14px 18px 10px 14px; font-family: 'Segoe UI', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; color: #0F172A; overflow: hidden; } .sbc-history-log__title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #1E293B; margin: 0 0 10px 0; } .sbc-history-log__list { height: calc(100% - 24px); overflow-y: auto; padding-right: 4px; } .sbc-history-log__item { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 56px 18px minmax(0, 1fr); column-gap: 10px; align-items: start; min-height: 60px; } .sbc-history-log__time { padding-top: 1px; text-align: right; } .sbc-history-log__date, .sbc-history-log__clock { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: #A3B3C7; line-height: 1.1; } .sbc-history-log__clock { margin-top: 3px; } .sbc-history-log__rail { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; min-height: 60px; } .sbc-history-log__dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; margin-top: 3px; flex-shrink: 0; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #FFFFFF; } .sbc-history-log__line { width: 1px; flex: 1; min-height: 40px; margin-top: 4px; background: #E2E8F0; } .sbc-history-log__body { padding: 0 0 14px 10px; border-left: 1px solid rgba(226, 232, 240, 0.55); } .sbc-history-log__event { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #1E293B; line-height: 1.3; } .sbc-history-log__detail { margin-top: 8px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #B6C2D2; line-height: 1.35; } .sbc-history-log__empty { font-size: 12px; color: #94A3B8; padding: 8px 0 0 0; }

helpers.name: json
helpers.code: function(val){ try { return JSON.parse(val || '[]'); } catch (e) { return []; } }
